title: Special Masala Fish Curry
description: Special Masala Fish Curry is a rich and flavorful Indian-style curry made with fried fish pieces simmered in a spiced masala gravy. It combines aromatic whole spices, a bold spice paste, and a perfectly balanced curry base for deep restaurant-style taste.

ingredients.title: For the Fish Marinade
items: 700 g firm fish fillets (sea bass, kingfish, halibut, or cod)
½ tbsp Kashmiri chili powder (for color & mild heat)
½ tsp kasuri methi (dried fenugreek leaves, crushed)

ingredients.title: For the Curry Base
items: 1 tsp mixed seeds (fenugreek + cumin + nigella + black mustard + fennel)

instruction.title: Step 1: Marinate the Fish
steps: Mix turmeric, Kashmiri chili powder, salt, ginger-garlic paste, lemon juice, oil, and kasuri methi.
Coat fish evenly and marinate for 20–30 minutes.

instruction.title: Step 2: Fry the Fish
steps: Shallow fry fish until golden brown on both sides.

instruction.title: Step 3: Prepare Spice Paste
steps: Dry roast whole spices until aromatic.
Grind with ginger, garlic, and water into a smooth paste.

instruction.title: Step 4: Cook Curry Base
steps: Heat oil and add mixed seeds.
Add spice paste and sauté until raw smell disappears.
Add tomato puree, turmeric, and chili powder.

instruction.title: Step 7: Finish
steps: Let rest for 10 minutes before serving.

servingSuggestions.title: Serving Suggestions
items: Serve hot with steamed basmati rice.
Pairs well with roti or paratha.
Garnish lightly with fresh coriander leaves.

chefTips: Do not stir aggressively after adding fish to keep pieces intact.
Use mustard oil for authentic flavor.
Letting it rest improves flavor depth.
